title: callicarpa aculeolata
intro: Callicarpa aculeolata, also known as the thorny purple bell, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Callicarpa aculeolata include reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as its potential to treat various infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
